protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and characterization of a Vibrio owensii phage phi50-12
protocols.Evidence: Phage particles were boiled in protein sample buffer containing SDS and subjected to SDS-PAGE/LC-MS/MS.

protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and characterization of a Vibrio owensii phage phi50-12
protocols.Evidence: Phage lysates were concentrated, centrifuged, loaded onto CsCl gradients, ultracentrifuged, and desalted by dialysis.

protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and characterization of a Vibrio owensii phage phi50-12
protocols.Evidence: Purified phage particles were applied to a grid, negatively stained, and examined by TEM.

protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and characterization of a Vibrio owensii phage phi50-12
protocols.Evidence: Cells were mixed with phage and the lysis curve was monitored after sub-40 °C incubation.

protocols.Paper_title: Isolation and characterization of a Vibrio owensii phage phi50-12
protocols.Evidence: CsCl-purified phage prep was boiled, separated by SDS-PAGE, and protein identity analyzed by LC/MS/MS.
